TT. fa. 48 (tT), nT^T 31-1-84 MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Depaj tment of Health) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 7th June, 1991 G.S.R. 303(E).—Whereas the Central Government ;s satisfied that the u\e of the drug Chloral Hydrate is likely to involve risk to human ,beirjfis and,that it is necessary and expedient in the public interest so to do; New therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by seotioti 10-A of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 (23 of 1940), the Central Govrrmnen hereby makes the following amendment in the notification of the Goyetn- -- 2 of 4 -- [<TTTII—««¥3(i)j UTTO v\ Traitf:vwrnt 3 ment of India in the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, GSR No. 577(E), dated 23rd July, 1983, namely:— In the Table to the said natincat;r«n, after serai number 6 and the entry relating thereto, the following serial number and entry shall be added namely:— "7 Chloral Hydrate as a drug". [No. X. 11014/9/90-DMS&PFA] BALBIR SINGH, Jt. Secy. Note : Government of India, Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Notification No. G.S.R. 577(E) , dated the 23rd July, 1983 was last amended by the following notification published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, sub-section (i) namely: G.S.R.
